title: Proclamation No. 416, s. 2003
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 416

DECLARING FRIDAY, JULY 4, 2003 AS A SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN CADIZ CITY

WHEREAS, Friday, July 4, 2003, marks the 36 th Charter Day anniversary of Cadiz City;

WHEREAS, it is fitting and proper that the people of Cadiz City be given full opportunity to celebrate this milestone in their city’s history with appropriate ceremonies;

NOW, THEREFORE, I, ALBERTO G. ROMULO, Executive Secretary, by order of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO, do hereby declare Friday, July 4, 2003 as a special (non-working) day in Cadiz City.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 28 th day of June, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Three.

By order of the President: (Sgd.) ALBERTO G. ROMULO Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary (Sgd.) JOAQUIN C. LAGONERA Senior Deputy Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
